LAW AND MOTION 302, CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MARY TRUONG IS DENIED. LEVIED FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $363.00 ARE ORDERED RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Sydney Fairbairn of Hunt & Henriquez (408-362-2270) appears as counsel for plaintiff

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court passes the mater to allow time for appearance by judgment debtor. There being no appearance, the CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MARY TRUONG IS DENIED. Levied funds in the amount of $363.00 are ordered released to the judgment creditor. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711, email: lreding@sftc.org. (D302)
